text: A baker makes 10 trays of cupcakes. Each tray holds 4.2 dozen cupcakes. How many dozen cupcakes does the baker make in total?
generatorSolution:
To find the total number of dozen cupcakes, multiply 4.2 by 10.

When you multiply a decimal number by 10, you move the decimal point one place to the right.

4.2 × 10 = 42

The baker makes 42 dozen cupcakes in total.
